rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
授業の概要 (Course Description)
This class focuses on speaking English.
Students will do communicative tasks and topic-based activities to practice different language functions. In group work learners will practice pronunciation skills, listening skills and conversational techniques. Students will be encouraged to rebuild and supplement their English vocabulary and grammar knowledge, thus recognising them better as tools to speak more comfortably and at greater length about more sophisticated content than they could at the outset of the course.
The course uses a textbook. Topic-based reading, audio and video materials will be used to promote classroom speaking activities and the consolidation of grammar/vocabulary knowledge. The course text also has web-based content for autonomous learning. The aim of all these activities is to raise the level of students' conversation competence, confidence and endurance.
Class information will be given through
1. Moodle LMS space provided by Kochi University
2. Classroom meeting

goals: 1. Course introduction (lesson content and approach, course requirements, and evaluation)
2. Group speaking 1: Topic Focus = Active pursuits, sports and hobbies; Grammar Focus = Expressing wants and intentions.
3. Group speaking 2: Topic Focus = Work and Professions; Grammar Focus = Describing Abilities/ Making recommendations
4. Group speaking 3: Topic Focus = Work and Professions; Grammar Focus = Expressing necessity and lack of necessity
5. Group speaking 4: Topic Focus = Work and Professions; Grammar Focus = Describing Pros and cons
6. Group speaking 5: Topic Focus = Work and Professions; Grammar Focus = Video Story/Relating a series of events/ Review of topic with group discussion activities
7. Group speaking 6: Topic Focus = Style, Fashion, Design and Things; Grammar Focus = Asking about and describing general behaviour
8. Group speaking 7: Topic Focus = Style, Fashion, Design and Things; Grammar Focus = Video Story/Relating a series of events/ Review of topic with group discussion activities
9. Group speaking 8: Topic Focus = Opinions; Grammar Focus = Asking for and giving opinions
10. Group speaking 9: Topic Focus = Opinions; Grammar Focus = Agreeing and disagreeing with opinions
11. Group speaking 10: Topic Focus = Opinions; Grammar Focus = Asking about and discussing an imaginary situation
12. Group speaking 11: Topic Focus = Opinions; Grammar Focus = Describing a series of events
13. Group speaking 12: Topic Focus = Opinions; Grammar Focus = Video Story/Relating a series of events/ Review of topic with group discussion activities
14. Final course assessment 1: (KU rubric: keeping going, content, pronunciation, grammar/vocabulary)
15. Final course assessment 2: (KU rubric: keeping going, content, pronunciation, grammar/vocabulary)

textbooks:
Speak Now Student Book Level 2
(Oxford University Press)
ISBN: 978-0-19-403016-8
https://elt.oup.com/catalogue/items/global/skills/speak_now_2/
*Each textbook has an individual access key for copyrighted online materials so it is essential that each student has their own book. Illegal photocopies of the textbook cannot be used or shared to access the online materials.
prep:
If the class is taught F2F detailed instructions about homework and preparation will be given in person.
If the class is taught online, detailed instructions about homework and preparation will be given through the Moodle space and Microsoft Teams.
Students should log into the Moodle space each week to check homework assignments and their due dates.
In addition to completing the week’s homework assignment, students should:
1. Look up new vocabulary from each current section prior to class, noting it in a vocabulary book/file. Memorize new words/phrases. Practice each unit conversation and key phrases.
2. Do self-study of vocabulary and grammar between classes
Specific details of each week’s topic will be given as needed in the Moodle space.
teachers: ◎ トンプソン アマンダ ジェーン

extra.label: 区分1
extra.text: 平成20年度以降入学生／令和６年度以降入学生

extra.label: 区分2
extra.text: 共通教育）初年次科目／国際コミュニケーション科目基軸英語

extra.label: 履修における注意点
extra.text: １年次に必修。１外国語（英語）履修上限年間10単位。卒業にはⅠとⅡ両方が必要。

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－省令で定める科目：外国語コミュニケーション

extra.label: この授業で身につける「10+1の能力」
extra.text:
専門分野に関する知識
人類の文化・社会・自然に関する知識
論理的思考力
課題探求力
語学に関するリテラシー
情報に関するリテラシー
表現力
コミュニケーション力
協働実践力
自律力
倫理観
統合・働きかけ

extra.text:
Speak Now Student Book Level 2
(Oxford University Press)
ISBN: 978-0-19-403016-8
https://elt.oup.com/catalogue/items/global/skills/speak_now_2/
*Each textbook has an individual access key for copyrighted online materials so it is essential that each student has their own book. Illegal photocopies of the textbook cannot be used or shared to access the online materials.
Online practice for grammar, vocabulary and listening practice using related textbook content is available at:
www.oxfordlearn.com/login
Enter the access code printed on the back inside cover of the textbook to use these online resources.
More details about this will be provided in the class Moodle space.
